title: Integrate Atlas with Google Vertex AI

bySection.heading: Step 3: Install the dependencies from the cloned repository.
Step 4: Run the application using Streamlit.

codeBlocks.section: Step 3: Install the dependencies from the cloned repository.
codeBlocks.content:
sudo apt update
sudo apt install python3-pip
sudo apt install git
cd MongoDB-VertexAI-Qwiklab
pip3 install -r requirements.txt

codeBlocks.section: Step 4: Run the application using Streamlit.
